.file-embed.background: rgb(65, 62, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(50, 47, 48) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(50, 47, 48) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #433F40 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#433F40, color-mix(in srgb, #433F40 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #433F40 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#433F40, color-mix(in srgb, #433F40 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(50, 47, 48) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(50, 47, 48) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
